metadata.description: Fracture of the distal radius and wrist articular region.

Complex regional pain syndrome after wrist injury.

decisionPoints.trigger: Acceptable alignment after closed reduction in patient suitable for casting
decisionPoints.action: Splint/cast with protected motion plan, repeat radiographs, and median nerve surveillance

decisionPoints.trigger: Unstable pattern with significant displacement, dorsal comminution, articular step-off, or failed closed reduction
decisionPoints.action: Proceed with operative fixation pathway (volar ORIF when indicated) with documented median nerve exam
